title: Device and system for providing a wind curtain for preventing bugs from contacting a viewing surface
abstract: The present invention is directed to a device and system designed to prevent organisms, such as bugs, from contacting a viewing surface, such as a windshield or window associated with a moving vehicle. The device contains at least a first side wall having an air intake member constructed to receive and capture air flow generated by movement of the motor vehicle. A second wall contains air distribution members and is oriented in a different direction as that of the first wall. Because the device as designed to have side walls oriented at different directions, air exiting the device travels in a different path than the path of entry. In this manner, air flow can be directed to travel across a viewing surface, thereby providing a curtain of air thereupon.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is: Claim 1. A device for providing a wind curtain upon a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle comprising a main body comprising a first surface, a second surface, and a third surface arranged about an interior area; said first surface configured to be securable to a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle; said second surface configured to receive airflow generated by movement of said moving vehicle, whereby said received airflow is directed into said interior region; and said third surface adapted to allow airflow out of said interior region and orientated at a different position relative to said second surface, whereby airflow directed out of said third surface travels in a direction that is different than the direction of the air flow entering said second surface. Claim 2. The device for providing a wind curtain upon a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle according to Claim 1 wherein said third surface is arranged in a substantially parallel orientation with respect to a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle. Claim 3. The device for providing a wind curtain upon a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle according to Claim 2 wherein said second surface is arranged at a different orientation with respect to said third surface. Claim 4. The device for providing a wind curtain upon a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle according to Claim 3 wherein said second surface is arranged at a 90 degree angle wirh respect to said third surface . Claim 5. The device for providing a wind curtain upon a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle according to Claim 3 wherein said second surface is arranged at an acute angle with respect to said third surface . Claim 6. The device for providing a wind curtain upon a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle according to Claim 1 wherein said first surface contains at least one air intake member and said third surface contains an air distribution member. Claim 7. The device for providing a wind curtain upon a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle according to Claim 1 wherein said at least one air intake member is at least one opening. Claim 8. The device for providing a wind curtain upon a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle according to Claim 1 wherein said at least one opening is a slot . Claim 9. The device for providing a wind curtain upon a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle according to Claim 8 wherein said slot extends a distance 

between a first end of said second surface and a second end of said second surface. Claim 10. The device for providing a wind curtain upon a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle according to Claim 1 wherein said at least one air intake member is a plurality of openings. Claim 11. The device for providing a wind curtain upon a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle according to Claim 1 wherein said air distribution member is a plurality of openings. Claim 12. The device for providing a wind curtain upon a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle according to Claim 7 wherein said at least one air intake member has a larger diameter than a diameter of said at least one air distribution member. Claim 13. The device for providing a wind curtain upon a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle according to Claim 8 wherein said at least one air intake member is fluidly connected to said at least one air distribution member through an internal passageway. Claim 14. The device for providing a wind curtain upon a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle according to Claim 1 wherein said first surface contains an adhesive material. Claim 15. A system for providing a wind curtain upon a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle comprising : a first device secured at one end of a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle, said first device comprising a first wall securable to said viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle; a second wall comprising at least one air intake member adapted to received airflow generated by motion associated with movement of said moving vehicle; and a third wall comprising at least one air distribution member, said third wall orientated at a different position relative to said second wall; and a second device secured at a second end cf said viewing surface associated with said moving vehicle, said second device comprising a second device first wall securable to said viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle; a second device second wall comprising at least an air intake member adapted to receive airflow generated by motion associated with movement of said moving vehicle; and a second device third wall comprising at least one air distribution member, said second device third wall orientated at a different position relative to said second device second wall; whereby airflow exiting said air distribution member of said first device is directed in a path that is parallel to and towards the center of said viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle and airflow exiting said air distribution member of said second device is directed in a path that is parallel to and towards the center of said viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle to form an wind curtain thereupon. Claim 16. The system for providing a wind curtain upon a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle according to Claim 15 wherein said at least one air intake member of said first device is a plurality of openings and said at least one air intake of said second device is a second plurality of openings. Claim 17 . The system for providing a wind curtain upon a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle according to Claim 16 wherein said air intake members of said first device and said second device have a larger diameter than said air distribution members of said first device and said second device. Claim 18. The system for providing a wind curtain upon a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle according to Claim 17 wherein said air intake members of said first device are fluidly coupled to said air distribution members of said first device through an internal passageway; and said air intake members of said second device are fluidly coupled to said air distribution members of said second device through an internal passagewa . Claim 19. The system for providing a wind curtain upon a viewing surface associated with a moving vehicle according to Claim 15 wherein said first wall of said first device and said first wall of said second device each have an adhesive material.
